props.ChoiceText: Your people stayed where they were because you did, and afterward they remembered that longer than the position itself.
props.ChoiceBio: Holding the line taught you that steadiness under fear is remembered by survivors more fiercely than by chroniclers.

0.TransitionText: Because the line held under you, others trusted you to bear even larger responsibilities.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Officer, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TransitionText: Because the line held under you, battlefield reputation sharpened into the kind of honor that points toward knighthood.
1.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Knight, but you may remain on your current path instead.

2.TransitionText: Because the line held under you, discipline under fire made the ordered violence of the musketeer seem a natural fit.
2.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Musketeer, but you may remain on your current path instead.
